flowContents.name: Apple_Analytics_MinIO_Ingestion
flowContents.comments: Two sub-flows: (A) Apple Sales CSV from MinIO -> raw + curated back into MinIO, (B) Population JSON from local -> curated into MinIO.

processGroups.name: Flow A - Apple Sales CSV (MinIO to MinIO)
processGroups.comments: ListS3 -> FetchS3Object to get CSV from MinIO -> PutS3Object raw copy -> ConvertRecord CSV to JSONL -> PutS3Object curated -> LogAttribute.

processors.name: ListS3 - Apple Sales
processors.comments: Lists apple_global_sales_dataset.csv in MinIO bucket. Tracks state so it only picks up new/changed files.

attributes-to-ignore-regex.name: attributes-to-ignore-regex
attributes-to-ignore-regex.displayName: Attributes to Ignore by Regular Expression

attributes-to-log-regex.name: attributes-to-log-regex
attributes-to-log-regex.displayName: Attributes to Log by Regular Expression

processors.name: PutS3Object - Raw Apple Sales
processors.comments: Writes raw CSV copy to MinIO raw layer with ingest-date partitioning.

processors.name: FetchS3Object - Apple Sales
processors.comments: Fetches the actual CSV content from MinIO using the key from ListS3.

processors.name: PutS3Object - Curated Apple Sales
processors.comments: Writes curated JSONL to MinIO curated layer.

destination.name: PutS3Object - Curated Apple Sales
destination.comments: Writes curated JSONL to MinIO curated layer.

source.name: PutS3Object - Raw Apple Sales
source.comments: Writes raw CSV copy to MinIO raw layer with ingest-date partitioning.

source.name: FetchS3Object - Apple Sales
source.comments: Fetches the actual CSV content from MinIO using the key from ListS3.

destination.name: PutS3Object - Raw Apple Sales
destination.comments: Writes raw CSV copy to MinIO raw layer with ingest-date partitioning.

source.name: ListS3 - Apple Sales
source.comments: Lists apple_global_sales_dataset.csv in MinIO bucket. Tracks state so it only picks up new/changed files.

destination.name: FetchS3Object - Apple Sales
destination.comments: Fetches the actual CSV content from MinIO using the key from ListS3.

source.name: PutS3Object - Curated Apple Sales
source.comments: Writes curated JSONL to MinIO curated layer.

processGroups.name: Flow B - Population JSON (Local to MinIO)
processGroups.comments: GetFile local -> PutS3Object curated into MinIO -> LogAttribute.

processors.name: PutS3Object - Curated Dim Population
processors.comments: Writes population JSON into MinIO curated layer.

attributes-to-ignore-regex.name: attributes-to-ignore-regex
attributes-to-ignore-regex.displayName: Attributes to Ignore by Regular Expression

attributes-to-log-regex.name: attributes-to-log-regex
attributes-to-log-regex.displayName: Attributes to Log by Regular Expression

destination.name: PutS3Object - Curated Dim Population
destination.comments: Writes population JSON into MinIO curated layer.

source.comments: Writes population JSON into MinIO curated layer.
